positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical geometric constellation print. The central subject is a stylized, celestial nebula design formed by interconnecting clean geometric shapes (triangles, circles, and arcs) that evoke a deep-space feel. The color palette uses contrasting jewel tones: deep indigo blue, luminous turquoise, vibrant magenta, and hints of gold foil etching. The style should be a fusion of Art Deco geometry and cosmic bioluminescence. The composition must be central, highly scalable, and designed with strong contrast for visibility on apparel. Crisp lines, perfect symmetry, high contrast, intricate patterns, modern print style.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low resolution, noise, bad anatomy, ugly, out of frame, poorly drawn, extra limbs, asymmetry
